controls.name: Separation of Duties
controls.objective: Ensure the employee onboarding a vendor cannot approve invoices for that vendor.

controls.name: Invoice Threshold Enforcement
controls.objective: Prevent invoice splitting from bypassing approval thresholds.

controls.name: Rapid Vendor-to-Payment Review
controls.objective: Ensure newly created vendors cannot be paid before a minimum vetting period.

controls.name: Senior Approver Requirement
controls.objective: Require senior approvers for high-value transactions.

controls.name: Approval Presence Check
controls.objective: Ensure every paid invoice has an explicit approval decision.

controls.name: Duplicate Invoice Screening
controls.objective: Prevent duplicate invoices of identical amount and timing from being processed.

controls.name: Invoice-Transaction Amount Match
controls.objective: Ensure approved invoice values match executed payment amounts.

controls.name: Dormant Vendor Reactivation Review
controls.objective: Require legitimacy review before paying long-dormant vendors.
